_doc: Single resolver for file -> lane ownership (State-Integrity Law S5). scripts/lane_guard.py reads this to WARN when a worktree edits a file outside its own lane. RULE: every tracked file is owned by exactly one lane OR listed in 'shared'. Edits to THIS file are integrator-only (it concerns all lanes). A lane = the git branch 'lane/<name>'; on 'main' or a non-lane branch the guard stays silent (you're the integrator).
